creator: ruben@verweg.com
text:
The recent fix to devel-py-logilab-common (ports/140826) didn't take
devel/py-reverse into account

Fix: Enclosed patch resolves this issue. However, the post-install target of
py-reverse's Makefile seems to be a no op as those files are no longer
installed. Someone with a better python hat might have a better idea on what
to do with it. For now I left it as is.
How-To-Repeat: 	
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.7.20091213001910/py26-reverse-0.5.2.log
